seo.title: Contact Nguyen Minh Thien | Software Engineer
seo.description: Get in touch with Nguyen Minh Thien, a Software Engineer at Nature Flow Co., Ltd. Find contact details, social media, and professional links.

hero.tagline: Currently a Software Engineer at Nature Flow Co., Ltd.

about.title: About
about.body: I am a Software Engineer and Founder of Nature Flow Co., Ltd, specializing in software outsourcing services, digital solution services, e-commerce, and agriculture. I create practical apps and lightweight tools, focusing on solving everyday problems in simple, reliable ways.

item1.title: Software Outsourcing
item1.desc: High-quality software development services tailored to business needs.

item2.title: Digital Solutions
item2.desc: Transforming workflows with efficient digital systems and automation.

item3.title: E-commerce & Tech
item3.desc: Building robust platforms for e-commerce and specialized industries like Agriculture.

contact_info.title: Contact & Socials
contact_info.subtitle: Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below. I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.

trust.title: Let's Connect
trust.body: Whether you have a project idea, a technical question, or just want to say hi, feel free to drop a message. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.title: Direct Feedback
contact.subtitle: Report bugs or share ideas for future tools.

footer.line: Built with care. Thanks for visiting.
